name: Chocolate Syrup Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and sugar in a large bowl until smooth.
2. Add the eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Stir in the salt.
4. Mix in the flour.
5. Fold in the chocolate syrup, vanilla, and chopped nuts.
6. Pour the mixture into a greased 9-inch square pan and spread evenly.
7. Bake at 350°F for 35 minutes.
Note: Do not overcrowd the oven with too many brownies to ensure even baking.
